Appearance

AI Programming Tutorials

Systematically learn Skills, OpenSpec, Harness and other AI programming paradigms

Get Started
Quick Start
GitHub
🧠

Skills

Learn to create reusable AI skills with structured prompts and examples to boost development efficiency

📋

OpenSpec

Master spec-driven development, define specifications before coding to align human and AI understanding

🧪

Harness

Build testing infrastructure with Evaluators and Mock Server to ensure AI output quality

🚀

Practice Projects

Experience the complete AI programming workflow from spec to code through e-commerce MVP projects

Choose Your Role ​

👨‍💻 Full-stack Developer ​

For: Developers who want to quickly get started with AI-assisted development

Learning Path:

  1. Quick Start - Get started in 5 minutes
  2. Tool Usage - Create your first Skill
  3. Practice Projects - Hands-on practice

Start Learning →

🏗️ Architect ​

For: Architects who want to understand AI programming system design

Learning Path:

  1. Architecture Overview - Understand spec-driven development
  2. OpenSpec Deep Dive - Master the workflow
  3. Harness Testing - Quality assurance

Deep Dive →

🎓 Student ​

For: Students or beginners who want to systematically learn AI programming

Learning Path:

  1. Basic Concepts - Understand core concepts
  2. Progressive Learning - From beginner to advanced
  3. Practice Exercises - Hands-on exercises

Start from Zero →

Why This Tutorial? ​

  • Comprehensive: Covers Skills, OpenSpec, Harness - the three core paradigms
  • Practice-Oriented: Learn through real projects, not just theory
  • Chinese-Friendly: Written specifically for Chinese developers
  • Open Source: MIT licensed, free to learn and contribute

基于 MIT 许可发布
